generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring vehicle speed."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedDataStream
]
instance AccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring vehicle acceleration."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AccelerationDataStream
]
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring vehicle temperature."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance SpeedDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor
]
instance AccelerationDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AccelerationSensor
]
instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance VehicleDynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic vehicle model expressed by differential equations representing physical behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEngine, SupervisoryControlEngine, OptimizationEngine
]

instance SpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series speed data recorded from vehicle sensors."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEngine, MonitoringEngine, FaultDetectionEngine, SupervisoryControlEngine, OptimizationEngine
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedDataStream
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series acceleration data recorded from vehicle sensors."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEngine, MonitoringEngine, FaultDetectionEngine, SupervisoryControlEngine, OptimizationEngine
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataStream
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series temperature data recorded from vehicle sensors."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEngine, MonitoringEngine, FaultDetectionEngine, SupervisoryControlEngine, OptimizationEngine
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataStream
]

// C6: Services
instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that generates predictive simulations of future vehicle states based on current sensor readings."
    DTDFVocab:provides FutureStateInsight
]
instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that provides optimized operational parameters through model parameter adjustment."
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterAdjustmentAction
]
instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that identifies deviations indicating faults."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultAlertInsight
]
instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that infers internal states and suggests control actions."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlCommandAction
]
instance KnowledgeGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that creates actionable insights."
    DTDFVocab:provides ActionableInsight
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that performs real-time monitoring of vehicle operating parameters against predefined bounds."
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, PerformanceViolationInsight
]
instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that performs model calibration using sensor data."
]
instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that monitors system behavior against predefined constraints."
]

// C11: Enablers
instance CalibrationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that calibrates model parameters using sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]
instance MonitoringEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Monitors safety and performance constraints against model predictions."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]
instance FaultDetectionEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Detects faults by comparing expected to observed behavior."
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]
instance SupervisoryControlEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Infers unmeasured internal states and provides control commands."
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]
instance OptimizationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimizes operational parameters by adjusting model coefficients."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating safety violations detected by monitoring."
]
instance PerformanceViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating performance violations detected by monitoring."
]
instance FutureStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing predicted future vehicle state."
]
instance FaultAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight alerting on detected fault."
]
instance ActionableInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "General insight providing actionable recommendations."
]
instance ParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust model parameters automatically."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance ControlCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to send control command to vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Composed of a multi-layered orchestration, the DT operates by routing time-stamped sensor data from the physical twin through an acquisition layer into a centralized data bus. A calibration sub-layer applies parameter-identification algorithms to update physics-based and hybrid models. The updated models feed a monitoring layer that evaluates safety and performance constraints, while an optimisation/decision layer generates corrective actions that can be executed on the physical twin. This layered architecture is coordinated via a central workflow engine that manages data flow, service invocation, and violation handling, ensuring coherent integration of modelling, simulation, monitoring, and optimisation components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The lifecycle of the Digital Twin progresses through several distinct phases:
1. **Model Development** – Engineers construct abstract representations such as CAD or differential‑equation based dynamic models to capture specific aspects of the Physical Twin.
2. **Deployment** – These models, along with continuous sensor data streams, are integrated into the Digital Twin framework, establishing the initial simulation, monitoring, and optimisation environment.
3. **Operation** – The Twin ingests real‑time telemetry, applies calibration algorithms to refine model parameters, and feeds updated model predictions to monitoring modules that evaluate safety and performance against predefined thresholds.
4. **Evolution & Maintenance** – Detected violations trigger human or algorithmic interventions to adjust either the Physical Twin or the Twin’s models; the resulting updated models are re‑integrated, completing a continuous improvement loop. Governance of these stages is implicit in the integration of data, models, and algorithms, ensuring that each transition preserves fidelity through ongoing calibration and monitoring."
]
